headline: Electronics Manufacturing Services Market to Surge, Reaching USD 853.05 Billion by 2030
summary: The global electronics manufacturing services market is expected to soar from USD 648.51 billion in 2025 to USD 853.05 billion by 2030, registering a CAGR of 5.6%. This growth is driven by the rising demand for advanced electronic products across sectors like consumer devices, automotive, and healthcare. The automotive segment is anticipated to achieve the second-highest CAGR, while Asia Pacific leads with the highest regional growth due to favorable market conditions and strategic investments.

headline: 1 Profitable Stock with Solid Fundamentals and 2 That Underwhelm
summary: Not all profitable companies are built to last - some rely on outdated models or unsustainable advantages. Just because a business is in the green today doesn’t mean it will thrive tomorrow.

headline: Bull of the Day: Celestica Inc. (CLS)
summary: Celestica Inc. (CLS) is an electronics manufacturing services giant riding the artificial intelligence spending boom to new highs and posting massive earnings and revenue growth.
